name: South by South East International Festival
description:
Watch as we transform Nathan Phillips Square into a high-energy, global playground and celebrate Toronto's "World in a City" identity.

Tap into your latin flare with open-air dance floor with top Latin DJs, salsa, bachata and dance workshops and show-stopping Latin dance performances, thunderous drumming ensembles and live salsa big bands and Latin orchestras.

Be dazzled by Chinese lion and fan dances and K-Pop and Bollywood showcases. Enjoy acrobatics, samba, mariachi and feast on our interational market, cuisine, food truck alley and shopping. Watch live matches of soccer's biggest event!

Perfect for the whole family, this isn't just a festival, it's a full-on cultural explosion in the heart of the city.
